hero.tag: Now with fasting, goal phases & micronutrient tracking
hero.headlineLine2: Plan your meals. See your progress.
hero.subtitle: A personal nutrition app that respects your time and your data. Set targets, log meals, track fasting and your health — without a single tracking pixel.
hero.ctaFootnote: Free, open-source, runs offline. No card, no sign-up required to try.

features.eyebrow: Built around how you actually eat
features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

mealPlanning.title: Smart meal planning
mealPlanning.body: Auto-fill a day to your macro targets with a deterministic solver — or let Claude draft a coherent plan. Regenerate one slot when it doesn't fit.

logging.title: Log by photo, barcode, or voice
logging.body: Point your camera at a label or meal, scan a barcode against Open Food Facts, or just say what you ate — each becomes structured macros in a tap.

recipes.title: Recipes that compute
recipes.body: Build or generate recipes; the macros are summed from the ingredients, never guessed — so the numbers stay honest even when the AI drafts the recipe.

fasting.title: Intermittent fasting
fasting.body: Run a fast on the protocol you choose and watch a live timer cross the phases — fed, glycogen, fat-burning, ketosis, autophagy — with every finished fast saved to history.

goalPhases.title: Goal phases
goalPhases.body: Sequence a cut, diet break, maintenance, and lean bulk; your daily target follows whichever phase is active today, with a heads-up before one would raise your calories. (Pro)

healthJournal.title: A full health journal
healthJournal.body: Not just macros: log weight, body measurements with a body-fat estimate, blood pressure, and hydration — each charted over time on one Progress page.

micronutrients.title: Micronutrients, not just macros
micronutrients.body: Track ten vitamins and minerals against age- and sex-aware RDA targets, enriched from Open Food Facts as you log. (Pro)

trends.title: Trends + adaptive TDEE
trends.body: Moving-average weight with plateau detection, and a TDEE that recalibrates itself when your real-world change diverges from the formula.

ownership.title: Your data, your device
ownership.body: Local-first by default, with one-tap JSON export and no lock-in or tracking pixel. Pro adds encrypted cross-device sync, cloud backups, and a vector-PDF health report.

set.title: Set your targets
set.body: Mifflin–St Jeor BMR, activity-weighted TDEE, calorie goal anchored to a weekly weight-change rate.

log.title: Log what you eat
log.body: Built-in catalog, your own foods, or live Open Food Facts search - three sources, one box.

see.title: See your trends
see.body: Macro adherence, streaks, and a calibrated weight chart that adjusts your TDEE when reality diverges from formula.

pricing.title: Free forever. Pay if it earns it.
pricing.trialNote: All paid plans include a 7-day free trial - no card up front.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: The full calculator, planner, and health journal. Your data stays local.

plus.name: AI Plus
plus.tagline: Lift the AI cap and unlock reminders. Cancel any time.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Sync, micronutrients, goal phases, and encrypted backups.

storage.a: On your device, in IndexedDB. If you sign in, the same data syncs to a private Supabase project (RLS-scoped, only you can read it). Nothing leaves your device by default.

account.q: Do I need an account to use it?
account.a: No. Guest mode is the full app. Signing in only adds cross-device sync and engagement emails.

auth.a: Four ways. Passwordless email (we send you a code), Google, Apple, or a passkey — Face ID / Touch ID / Windows Hello / hardware key. Add one passkey from Settings and the next sign-in skips both the email round-trip and the two-factor prompt on that device.

ai.a: Not at all. The deterministic meal-planner hits your macro targets without any AI. The AI Plus / Pro tiers exist for people who want AI auto-fill and photo identification.

cancel.a: Yes - Settings → Billing has a one-click portal to cancel, change plan, or update payment. You keep access until the end of the paid period.

offline.a: Yes. Once visited, the service worker caches the app shell so you can open and use it without a network. New AI generations and sync require connectivity.

gdpr.a: Your data is exportable as JSON anytime, deletable in one click, and we don't run analytics or trackers. See /privacy for the full picture and your rights under EU/UK law.

source.a: Yes - Apache 2.0 on GitHub. You can self-host or audit any line.

finalCta.title: Five minutes. No card. No catch.
finalCta.body: Open the app, set your targets, and log your next meal. If you don't like it, your data is local - clear your browser and you're done.

changelogIndicator.ariaWithEntries: What's new — {count} entries since you last checked

bugReport.title: Report a bug
bugReport.description: We'll open GitHub in a new tab with your text pre-filled. You file the issue from there — nothing is sent from this app.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the bug in plain language. Steps to reproduce, what you expected, what actually happened.

context.checkbox: Auto-include browser + version (recommended). You'll see and can edit it on GitHub before submitting.

aboutPage.title: About Maqro
aboutPage.tagline: A personal macro calculator + meal planner that respects your time and your data. Open source, no analytics, local-first.

contact.label: Contact support
contact.detail: A real person reads every message

privacy.label: Privacy policy
privacy.detail: What we store, what we don't

linkedin.label: Maintainer on LinkedIn
linkedin.detail: Francesco Cosentino — the human behind Maqro

manifest.label: PWA manifest
manifest.detail: Install to home screen on iOS / Android

thanks.title: Thanks for using Maqro.
thanks.body: It's open source and free at the core because the maintainer wants to use it without ad tech, not because there's a plan to flip it. The paid plans cover the AI bill + hosting; the core stays free regardless.

header.title: Free forever. Pay if it earns it.
header.subtitle: The core calculator + planner is free forever. Paid plans unlock higher AI limits, sync, micronutrients, goal phases, and encrypted backups. All paid plans include a 7-day free trial — no card up front.

card.yearlyBilledNote: Billed €{yearly} yearly — {discount}% off the monthly rate.

matrix.title: Full feature comparison
matrix.subtitle: Every gated feature, listed once. Boolean rows are yes/no; numeric rows are the per-tier cap.

barcode.label: Barcode scan (label lookup)
barcode.detail: Live `BarcodeDetector` (or zxing fallback) → Open Food Facts. No AI usage.

photoMealId.label: Photo meal identification
photoMealId.detail: Counts toward your monthly AI generations.

fasting.label: Intermittent fasting
fasting.detail: Live timer through fed → glycogen → ketosis → autophagy, with completed-fast history.

bodyVitals.label: Body measurements + blood pressure
bodyVitals.detail: Waist/neck/hip with a body-fat estimate; blood pressure with ACC/AHA classification.

goalPhases.label: Goal phases
goalPhases.detail: Sequence cut → diet break → maintenance → lean bulk; the daily target follows the active phase.

micronutrients.label: Micronutrient tracking
micronutrients.detail: Ten vitamins & minerals vs age/sex RDA, enriched from Open Food Facts.

aiGenerations.label: AI generations per month
aiGenerations.detail: Generated meal plans, recipes, and photo IDs combined.

importRecipesUrl.label: Import recipes from a URL
importRecipesUrl.detail: Server-side fetch + AI structuring. Plus + Pro only.

encryptedBackup.label: Encrypted cloud backups
encryptedBackup.detail: Zero-knowledge, passphrase-locked — with a preview-before-apply restore.

healthReportPdf.label: Health report PDF
healthReportPdf.detail: Vector PDF: nutrition, weight, body, blood pressure, hydration, fasting, micronutrients.

manualJsonExport.label: Manual JSON export + import
manualJsonExport.detail: Works without an account on every plan.

customRecipeSlugs.label: Custom recipe share slugs
customRecipeSlugs.detail: Auto-generated slugs are available to everyone.

sourceGithub.label: Source code on GitHub
sourceGithub.detail: Maqro is open source — fork it, run it, audit it.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: The full calculator + planner. Your data stays local.

plus.name: AI Plus
plus.tagline: Lift the AI cap. Import recipes from any URL.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Sync, micronutrients, goal phases, and encrypted backups.

freeTier.q: Is there really a free tier forever?
freeTier.a: Yes. The core macro calculator, meal planner, weight + log history, recipe builder, and 25 AI generations per month are free with no time limit. We don't cripple the free tier to force an upgrade — if you don't need cloud sync or more AI than that, you don't need a paid plan.

trialHowItWorks.a: Click Start trial, sign in, enter a card. Stripe doesn't charge until day 7. You can cancel from the billing portal at any time during the trial — the card is never charged in that case.

switchPlans.q: Can I switch between Plus and Pro?
switchPlans.a: Yes, from Settings → Billing. Upgrades are prorated; downgrades take effect at the end of the current period. There's no contract — month to month, or year to year.

aiGenerationCount.q: What counts as an AI generation?
aiGenerationCount.a: Anything that calls the Anthropic API: AI meal plan generations, photo identifications, AI recipe generations, and URL recipe imports. The counter resets on the 1st of each calendar month.

dataStorage.a: On your device, in your browser's IndexedDB. If you're on the Pro plan and signed in, the same rows are also synced to a Supabase project (you control the deployment; row-level security pins each row to your user id). The free and Plus tiers run entirely local-first. See the privacy policy at /privacy for the full picture.

refunds.a: Within the first 14 days of a new paid subscription, yes — message us via the contact form and we'll process it through Stripe. Beyond that we evaluate case by case.

stillUnsure.title: Still on the fence?
stillUnsure.body: The whole app runs without an account. Try it locally — if it earns a plan, upgrade later. Questions go through the contact form; a real person reads every message.

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.subtitle: A real person reads every message. Pick the path that fits — most replies go out within a working day.

changelogPage.title: What's new
changelogPage.subtitle: Notable changes, ordered newest first. Releases without a user-visible change are omitted.

legalPage.authoritativeNote: The English version of this document is authoritative. Translations are provided for convenience only; in case of any discrepancy, the English text prevails.
